mapper.sql: id, email, password_hash, email_verified, email_verification_token, provider, provider_id, nickname, profile_image, bio, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, email_verified, email_verification_token, nickname) VALUES (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{emailVerified}, #{emailVerificationToken}, #{nickname})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM users WHERE email_verification_token = #{token} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE nickname = #{nickname})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email_verified = TRUE, email_verification_token = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET email_verification_token = #{token}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE users
nickname = #{nickname}, profile_image = #{profileImage}, bio = #{bio}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, nickname = #{nickname}, password_hash = 'DELETED-' || #{id}, email_verification_token = NULL, profile_image = NULL, bio = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
